title: End+
description: Adds new features to the end including new armor, tools, ores, and more!
body:
# End+

Enhance your End dimension experience with exciting new features! This mod adds a new tier of armor/tools, and end-game villager trading. Perfect for adventurers seeking to conquer the End like never before!

## What this mod adds:

This mod adds many new and cool features, including:
- Armor Sets
- Tool Sets
- Ore Sets
- End-Game Villager Trades

## What will be added?

Make sure to follow to be notified of new updates!
